basic_details.job_title: Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Kalakshetra Foundation. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have qualifications such as Master’s Degree with B.Ed., Degree with B.Ed., Montessori Diploma [AMI/IMTC], or Montessori Course Certificate are eligible to apply for these Teaching Posts vacancies. The email application process for Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 18 May 2026. Candidates

qualification.details: PGT (Business Studies & Accountancy): Master's degree in the concerned subject with a B.Ed. from a recognized University. TGT (Maths): Degree in the respective subject with B.Ed from a recognized University. SGT (Tamil): Degree in the respective subject with a B.Ed from a recognized University. Montessori Teacher: Any degree with a valid Montessori Diploma [AMI/IMTC]. Montessori Assistant: Any Degree with a Montessori Course Certificate.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalakshetra Foundation Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts is 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Posts at Kalakshetra Foundation?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various Teaching Posts at the Kalakshetra Foundation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these posts by sending their applications via Email.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the PGT post?
faq.answer: For the PGT (Business Studies & Accountancy) post, a Master's degree in the concerned subject with a B.Ed. from a recognized University is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Kalakshetra Foundation Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include a demo class followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Kalakshetra Foundation recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Teaching Posts at Kalakshetra Foundation is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which city and state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Kalakshetra Foundation located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Kalakshetra Foundation?
faq.answer: The official website of Kalakshetra Foundation is www.kalakshetra.in, where you can find more details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed when applying via email?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
